blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 46°F.
Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 51°F.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
